requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Characteristics & Conformity Testing (Inverter Interface)
requirement_topic.zh: 并网特性与合规测试（逆变器接口）
requirement_topic.zht: 併網特性與合規測試（逆變器介面）

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters sold in Brazil must comply with ABNT NBR 16149 (grid connection characteristics: voltage, frequency, power factor, reconnection delay, anti-islanding) and ABNT NBR 16150 (conformity test procedures for those characteristics). Testing must be performed by an INMETRO-accredited laboratory in Brazil and a Certificate of Conformity issued before commercial placement.
summary.zh: 在巴西销售的并网光伏逆变器须符合 ABNT NBR 16149（并网特性：电压、频率、功率因数、重连延迟、防孤岛）及 ABNT NBR 16150（上述特性的合规测试程序）。测试必须由巴西 INMETRO 认可实验室执行，并在商业投放前取得合规证书。
summary.zht: 在巴西銷售的併網光伏逆變器須符合 ABNT NBR 16149（併網特性：電壓、頻率、功率因數、重連延遲、防孤島）及 ABNT NBR 16150（上述特性之合規測試程序）。測試必須由巴西 INMETRO 認可實驗室執行，並於商業投放前取得合規證書。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR 16149:2013 — Sistemas fotovoltaicos (FV) — Características da interface de conexão com a rede elétrica de distribuição
ABNT NBR 16150:2013 — Sistemas fotovoltaicos (FV) — Características da interface de conexão com a rede elétrica de distribuição — Procedimento de ensaio de conformidade
ABNT NBR IEC 62116:2012 — Procedimento de ensaio de prevenção de ilhamento para inversores de sistemas fotovoltaicos conectados à rede elétrica

summary.en: Chinese grid-tied PV inverters are typically certified to GB/T 19964 (technical requirements for PV power station grid connection) and GB/T 29319 (technical requirements for distributed PV grid connection). NB: GB/T 19964 is a national recommended standard (GB/T), not a mandatory GB standard. Chinese CQC or CGC certification based on GB/T 19964 is not recognized by INMETRO and does not substitute Brazilian conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器通常依据 GB/T 19964（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定）及 GB/T 29319（光伏发电系统接入配电网技术规定）进行认证。注：GB/T 19964 为推荐性国标，非强制性标准。基于 GB/T 19964 的 CQC 或 CGC 认证不被 INMETRO 认可，不能替代巴西合规评定。
summary.zht: 中國併網光伏逆變器通常依據 GB/T 19964（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定）及 GB/T 29319（光伏發電系統接入配電網技術規定）進行認證。注：GB/T 19964 為推薦性國標，非強制性標準。基於 GB/T 19964 的 CQC 或 CGC 認證不被 INMETRO 認可，不能替代巴西合規評定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964:2012 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical requirements for connecting PV power stations to the power system)
GB/T 29319:2012 — 光伏发电系统接入配电网技术规定 (Technical requirements for connecting distributed PV systems to distribution networks)

gap.en: CRITICAL GAP: Chinese GB/T 19964 certification is not accepted by INMETRO. Exporters must re-test inverters against NBR 16149 / NBR 16150 / NBR IEC 62116 at an INMETRO-accredited Brazilian lab and obtain a Brazilian Certificate of Conformity. Grid parameters also differ: Brazil uses 60 Hz (vs China 50 Hz), 127/220 V (vs 220/380 V), requiring hardware adaptation and re-validation.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国 GB/T 19964 认证不被 INMETRO 接受。出口商须在 INMETRO 认可的巴西实验室按 NBR 16149 / NBR 16150 / NBR IEC 62116 重新测试逆变器，并取得巴西合规证书。电网参数亦有差异：巴西采用 60 Hz（中国为 50 Hz）及 127/220 V（中国为 220/380 V），需进行硬件适配及重新验证。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國 GB/T 19964 認證不被 INMETRO 接受。出口商須在 INMETRO 認可的巴西實驗室按 NBR 16149 / NBR 16150 / NBR IEC 62116 重新測試逆變器，並取得巴西合規證書。電網參數亦有差異：巴西採用 60 Hz（中國為 50 Hz）及 127/220 V（中國為 220/380 V），需進行硬件適配及重新驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO certification required before sale in Brazil (Portaria INMETRO governing PV inverters)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) — GB/T 19964 is a recommended national standard; CQC/CGC certification is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese inverters certified only to GB/T 19964 cannot be legally sold in Brazil. Re-testing and INMETRO certification against NBR 16149 / NBR 16150 / NBR IEC 62116 is required. Hardware must support 60 Hz / 127-220 V grid parameters.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有 GB/T 19964 认证的中国逆变器不得在巴西合法销售。须依据 NBR 16149 / NBR 16150 / NBR IEC 62116 重新测试并取得 INMETRO 认证。硬件须支持 60 Hz / 127-220 V 电网参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有 GB/T 19964 認證的中國逆變器不得在巴西合法銷售。須依據 NBR 16149 / NBR 16150 / NBR IEC 62116 重新測試並取得 INMETRO 認證。硬件須支援 60 Hz / 127-220 V 電網參數。

requirement_topic.en: Distributed Generation Grid Access Registration (ANEEL REN 1000 / REN 482)
requirement_topic.zh: 分布式发电并网接入登记（ANEEL REN 1000 / REN 482）
requirement_topic.zht: 分佈式發電併網接入登記（ANEEL REN 1000 / REN 482）

summary.en: All distributed PV generation systems connected to the Brazilian grid must comply with ANEEL Normative Resolution 1000/2021 (which consolidated and superseded REN 482/2012). The resolution mandates: application to the local distribution utility (DISCO) for grid access; technical adequacy review; metering requirements for net-metering (compensação de energia); and use of inverters holding a valid INMETRO Certificate of Conformity. The connected inverter model must appear on INMETRO's certified product registry.
summary.zh: 所有接入巴西电网的分布式光伏发电系统须符合 ANEEL 规范性决议第 1000/2021 号（该决议已合并并取代 REN 482/2012）。该决议要求：向当地配电公司（DISCO）申请并网接入；进行技术适宜性审查；满足净计量（能源补偿）的计量要求；以及使用持有 INMETRO 有效合规证书的逆变器，所连接的逆变器型号须出现在 INMETRO 认证产品注册表中。
summary.zht: 所有接入巴西電網的分佈式光伏發電系統須符合 ANEEL 規範性決議第 1000/2021 號（該決議已合併並取代 REN 482/2012）。該決議要求：向當地配電公司（DISCO）申請併網接入；進行技術適宜性審查；滿足淨計量（能源補償）的計量要求；以及使用持有 INMETRO 有效合規證書的逆變器，所連接的逆變器型號須出現在 INMETRO 認證產品登記冊中。

standards_or_laws: ANEEL Resolução Normativa 1000/2021 — Estabelece as Regras de Prestação do Serviço Público de Distribuição de Energia Elétrica (consolidates micro/mini-DG rules)
ANEEL Resolução Normativa 482/2012 — original DG resolution (superseded by REN 1000/2021 but referenced in legacy literature)
Lei 14.300/2022 — Marco Legal da Micro e Minigeração Distribuída (legal framework for micro and mini distributed generation in Brazil)

summary.en: In China, distributed PV grid access is governed by the National Energy Administration (NEA) and local grid operators (State Grid / Southern Grid) under NEA documents and GB/T 29319. Registration is handled directly with the local grid company. There is no equivalent to ANEEL's per-inverter-model INMETRO certification prerequisite; Chinese grid operators accept inverters certified to domestic standards by domestic labs.
summary.zh: 在中国，分布式光伏并网接入由国家能源局（NEA）及当地电网运营商（国家电网/南方电网）依据 NEA 相关文件及 GB/T 29319 进行管理。登记工作直接与当地电网公司办理。中国没有与 ANEEL 要求逆变器型号获得 INMETRO 认证的对应规定；中国电网运营商接受经国内实验室按国内标准认证的逆变器。
summary.zht: 在中國，分佈式光伏併網接入由國家能源局（NEA）及當地電網運營商（國家電網/南方電網）依據 NEA 相關文件及 GB/T 29319 進行管理。登記工作直接與當地電網公司辦理。中國沒有與 ANEEL 要求逆變器型號獲得 INMETRO 認證的對應規定；中國電網運營商接受經國內實驗室按國內標準認證的逆變器。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 29319:2012 — 光伏发电系统接入配电网技术规定
国家能源局关于规范光伏电站投资开发秩序的通知 (NEA notices on PV plant development — exact document number varies by year/province; not a single national standard but a series of NEA administrative circulars)
Q/GDW 1480-2015 — 国家电网分布式电源接入电网技术规定 (State Grid Corporation enterprise standard for distributed source grid connection — confirmed real; superseded earlier Q/GDW 480-2010)

gap.en: CRITICAL GAP: Chinese inverters must be individually registered on the INMETRO certified product database before any Brazilian installer can legally connect them under ANEEL REN 1000. Without INMETRO registration, the local DISCO will reject the grid access application. There is no mutual recognition or equivalency pathway between Chinese domestic certification (CQC/CGC) and INMETRO. Exporters must proactively obtain INMETRO certification per model SKU before entering the Brazilian market.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国逆变器须在 INMETRO 认证产品数据库中逐型号注册，巴西安装商方可依据 ANEEL REN 1000 合法接入电网。若未完成 INMETRO 注册，当地配电公司（DISCO）将拒绝并网申请。中国国内认证（CQC/CGC）与 INMETRO 之间没有相互认可或等效路径。出口商须在进入巴西市场前，针对每个产品型号主动取得 INMETRO 认证。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國逆變器須在 INMETRO 認證產品資料庫中逐型號登記，巴西安裝商方可依據 ANEEL REN 1000 合法接入電網。若未完成 INMETRO 登記，當地配電公司（DISCO）將拒絕併網申請。中國國內認證（CQC/CGC）與 INMETRO 之間沒有相互認可或等效路徑。出口商須在進入巴西市場前，針對每個產品型號主動取得 INMETRO 認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ANEEL REN 1000/2021 and Lei 14.300/2022 require INMETRO-certified inverters for all grid-connected DG systems; non-compliant installations will be refused connection by the DISCO
mandatory_status.cn: Administrative requirement — NEA/grid-operator approval required but based on domestic standards; no INMETRO equivalent

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese inverter models not listed in the INMETRO certified product registry will be rejected by Brazilian distribution utilities during grid access applications under ANEEL REN 1000/2021. Exporters must complete INMETRO certification for each model before shipment to Brazil.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未列入 INMETRO 认证产品注册表的中国逆变器型号，在依据 ANEEL REN 1000/2021 申请并网接入时将被巴西配电公司拒绝。出口商须在发货至巴西前为每个型号完成 INMETRO 认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未列入 INMETRO 認證產品登記冊的中國逆變器型號，在依據 ANEEL REN 1000/2021 申請併網接入時將被巴西配電公司拒絕。出口商須在發貨至巴西前為每個型號完成 INMETRO 認證。
